MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-20-2015 Advanced From Sep-24-15 To Aug-24-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Resp. To Fi-1
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. HANLEN J. CHANG, ESQ. of Law Offices of Hanlen J. Chang, Tel No. 415-757-3422 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Defendant MICHAEL CAEL, Tel No. 510-333-4775 appearing in pro per.

RULING - The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at the hearing. The Court determines that Defendant Michael Cael is not the subject of the present motion. Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. No appearance made by or for the subject of the present motion, Triscila Cale. Matter argued and submitted by Plaintiff's counsel. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff SUSAN CIEUTAT'S Motion To Compel Further Resp. To FI-1 is granted in part and denied in part. Court to prepare a formal order. Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANIEL A. SEROT OF THE VLA&A LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-291-8844, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE VAN DE POEL, LEVY, ALLEN & ARNEL, LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS MICHAEL CAEL AND TRISCILA CAEL is Granted no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb
